_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference. Post-EU precision realignment removed placeholder/invalid passport or phone-shaped tax/passport bait from strict benchmark truth where current deterministic strict mode correctly suppresses it.

_agent_review.notes: Post-EU global realignment after narrow precision guards for placeholder passport values, obfuscated passport phone-shaped fragments, and tax-ID phone-shaped bait. Strict labels now match current deterministic strict-mode findings; removed false strict labels are kept out of strict benchmark truth.
